privileged_info_summary: The credit card rewards optimization task uses 35 synthetic transactions across 4 real credit card names (Chase Freedom, Discover, Amex Blue Preferred, Citi Double Cash) with verified reward rates: Chase Freedom 5% groceries/1% other categories, Discover 1% groceries/5% gas/1% other categories, Amex Blue Preferred 6% groceries/3% gas/1% other categories, Citi Double Cash 2% all categories. Task spans 180 seconds with 15 max steps, operates on ODS format at /home/ga/Documents/cc_rewards_analysis.ods across 3 sheets (Transactions, Card_Details, Analysis), with 5 transactions containing blank categories requiring cleanup. Pass threshold is 85% (5/6 criteria met), requiring minimum 10 formulas throughout spreadsheet.
